aeo_readiness.summary: While the business has a strong foundation with good NAP consistency and a solid GBP presence, it lacks the necessary schema markup and conversational content to be cited by AI models effectively.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema with detailed questions and answers.
Add LocalBusiness schema to provide AI models with structured data.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours, but it could benefit from more Q&A engagement and regular posts.
critical_issues: No active management of the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service processes
LocalBusiness schema can be enhanced with more detailed information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it less visible to AI models.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'AC repair near me' and 'HVAC maintenance tips'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating detailed content that showcases expertise in HVAC services and positions the business as a local authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, the business misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The absence of FAQ and LocalBusiness schema means AI models lack the structured data needed to cite the business in relevant queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and GBP optimization to ensure the business is cited by AI models and visible in voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search, making it critical to act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Optimize for ChatGPT & Voice Search
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can implement these strategies and boost your AI-driven leads.
business_name: TCom Mechanical AC Repair & HVAC Services
page_title: TCom Mechanical AC Repair & HVAC Services
